headline: A Look At Invitation Homes (INVH) Valuation After Recent Share Price Weakness
summary: Recent share performance and business snapshot Invitation Homes (INVH) has been under pressure recently, with the share price flat over the past day but showing declines over the past week, month, past 3 months, year to date, and past year. At a recent close of US$24.85, the US single family rental REIT carries a market value of about US$14.9b and reports annual revenue of US$2.72b alongside net income of US$586.96m.
